final:
module pipo_shift_register (
    input clk,
    input load_en,
    input shift_en,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (load_en) begin
            data_out <= data_in; // Load data
        end else if (shift_en) begin
            data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[7:1]}; // Shift right
        end
    end
endmodule
